---
title: "two_to_merge_to_one_layout"
---

[< Back to Reference](../reference.qmd) | [View source](https://codeberg.org/usrbinr/stwd/src/branch/main/R/stwd.R#L1749)

# `two_to_merge_to_one_layout()`

Make a 2 merge to 1 plot

## Usage

```r
two_to_merge_to_one_layout(fig, first_level_sign = "+")
```

## Arguments

| Argument | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `fig` | list of 3 ggplot objects: two left panels and one right panel |
| `first_level_sign` | sign to display on the connector (default: "+") |

## Value

ggplot

## Description

Creates a layout where two plots on the left converge via a connector
into a single plot on the right.
